children.text:
Affirm offers flexible payment options and customizable programs for merchants from any industry, across the full spectrum of average order values.

More than a payment provider, Affirm is a powerful marketing tool, with targeted products for every step of the consumer journey. Drive conversion, boost average order value, and grow your customer base — all while meeting your unique business needs.

excerpt: Buy now, pay later (BNPL) financing that lets shoppers pay over time with terms shown at checkout.

content_features.title: BNPL at checkout
content_features.description: Offer pay-over-time options where eligible shoppers can choose a plan during checkout and complete the purchase without leaving the flow.

content_features.title: US dollar processing and settlement
content_features.description: This payment method is commonly configured to process and settle in USD; confirm any additional currency support with your PSP.

content_features.title: Authorization outcomes impact conversion
content_features.description: Like any payment method, authorization approvals/declines affect conversion—monitor decline reasons and retry behavior to tune your checkout.

content_features.title: Refund handling
content_features.description: Support refunds (including partial refunds where enabled by your PSP) so you can manage returns while keeping reconciliation consistent.

content_features.title: Disputes and chargebacks
content_features.description: Chargebacks can occur; align order evidence (delivery, customer communications, timestamps) to speed dispute responses.

content_features.title: Clear customer messaging
content_features.description: Present financing terms and eligibility messaging clearly in checkout to reduce confusion, drop-off, and support contacts.

content_features.title: Online acceptance
content_features.description: Affirm supports ecommerce and other online payment flows.

content_features.title: In-person acceptance
content_features.description: Affirm supports in-person checkout and POS acceptance.

tip: Track Affirm declines separately from card declines, and review decline reason codes plus checkout messaging to reduce avoidable drop-off.

faq.question: What is Affirm?
faq.answer: Affirm is a buy now, pay later (BNPL) provider that lets eligible shoppers pay over time with installment or other financing plans presented at checkout.

faq.question: Is Affirm a PSP or an acquirer?
faq.answer: Affirm is a payment method/financing provider. You typically enable it through your PSP (for example, via a payment platform integration) rather than using it as a card acquirer.

faq.question: Where is Affirm available?
faq.answer: Affirm is primarily associated with the United States and Canada. Exact availability and eligibility can vary by integration partner and merchant account setup.

faq.question: Why are Affirm payments being declined?
faq.answer: Declines can be driven by shopper eligibility, transaction details, or policy/risk checks. Track decline reasons from your PSP, confirm required fields are being sent, and ensure checkout messaging is clear before prompting the shopper to try another method.

faq.question: Does Affirm support refunds and partial refunds?
faq.answer: Refund capabilities (including partial refunds) depend on your PSP/integration. Confirm which refund operations are enabled in your payment platform and test end-to-end flows.

faq.question: Does Affirm support multiple currencies?
faq.answer: Affirm is most commonly used for USD checkout flows, and any additional currency or settlement support depends on your PSP and merchant configuration.

seo.seo_description: Affirm is a buy now, pay later payment method that lets shoppers pay over time with terms shown at checkout. Learn key considerations for acceptance, declines, and refunds.
seo.keywords: Affirm, BNPL, buy now pay later, installment payments, pay over time
